ValidationRule.description: Prevents Verified from being checked if EDMIS Location ID is blank. EDMIS_Location_Id__c is a formula from the Organizer Account EDMIS ID. Required for SBA 888 XML reporting pipeline.
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This Event cannot be Verified because the Organizer Account does not have an EDMIS ID on file. Please update the Organizer Account record with a valid EDMIS ID before verifying this Event.
